title: 'Total lack of respect': Macron interrupts speaker to ask for silence
summary_full: The French president stood up during a conference in Kenya to tell the audience to quieten down, saying it was “impossible” for speakers to be heard.
summary_public: The French president stood up during a conference in Kenya to tell the audience to quieten down, saying it was “impossible” for speakers to be heard.

FR.label: neutral
